experiments.name: Prisma singleton + static imports
experiments.hypothesis: Replacing dynamic await import('@bigmuddy/database') with static singleton eliminates cold-start overhead on every API call
changes: Migrated 48 API routes from dynamic to static import
Added import { prisma } from '@/lib/db' to 43 additional routes

experiments.name: API Cache-Control headers
experiments.hypothesis: Adding s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate to high-traffic GET routes reduces avg API latency via edge caching

experiments.name: Static page generation timeout increase
experiments.hypothesis: Large static pages (weddings: 1161 lines) timeout at default 60s; 120s prevents build failure
